overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character in a suit walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The character traverses covered walkways, crosses streets, ascends illuminated stairways, and explores multi-level plazas with heavy cyberpunk aesthetics including holographic advertisements and vibrant neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway transitioning to city street

events.description: exits covered wooden walkway onto open city street with glass towers
crosses the street at illuminated crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking through covered walkway, exiting onto city street, and crossing the road

notable_agents.action: walking in opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: overhead covering of the pedestrian walkway with wooden slats and structural beams
illuminated cyan neon sign reading WILLOW on the building facade
tall modern skyscrapers with illuminated glass windows and neon accents

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered wooden walkway with a neon sign visible on the right, then exits onto an open city street surrounded by glass office towers. The character crosses the street at a crosswalk while sparse pedestrian traffic moves along the sidewalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk approaching illuminated stairway entrance

events.description: approaching green-lit stairway entrance with cyan neon illumination
begins ascending wide concrete stairs with green neon lighting

agents.ego_description: walking along urban sidewalk and ascending green-lit stairs to upper level

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs illuminated with intense cyan-green neon lighting from below
tropical palm trees lining the street against the dark sky

segments.scene_description: Walking along a concrete sidewalk lined with palm trees, the character approaches a stairway bathed in green neon light. The character begins ascending the illuminated stairs while the glass office towers shift to the left side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor lobby with WILD BLUE signage transitioning to elevated outdoor walkway

events.description: exits indoor WILD BLUE lobby onto elevated outdoor walkway
lighting shifts from green-white indoor to pink-magenta neon on elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: walking through indoor lobby with tropical plants and exiting onto elevated walkway with pink neon lighting

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on elevated walkway wearing bright orange clothing

entered.detail: large illuminated wall sign with WILD BLUE text surrounded by tropical plant decorations
transparent geometric glass ceiling showing the night sky above the stairs
large holographic advertisements and digital screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the top of the stairs and enters an indoor lobby featuring the WILD BLUE signage and tropical plants. Exiting the lobby, the scene transitions to an elevated outdoor walkway bathed in pink-magenta neon light, with large holographic billboards visible on surrounding buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level plaza with outdoor cafes and heavy neon signage

events.description: descends stairs to lower plaza level with outdoor cafes
ascends stairs from plaza level toward green-lit corridor

agents.ego_description: descending stairs to lower plaza with outdoor cafes, walking through the plaza, then ascending stairs on the opposite side

notable_agents.action: sitting at outdoor cafe table under yellow umbrella

entered.detail: large yellow and white umbrellas covering outdoor seating areas with neon-lit tables
massive illuminated advertisement for KIROSHI optics on building facade
wide concrete stairs connecting upper and lower plaza levels with metal railings

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the elevated walkway into a bustling multi-level plaza filled with outdoor cafes under yellow umbrellas. Walking past the KIROSHI billboard and other neon advertisements, the character traverses the plaza and begins ascending another stairway toward a green-lit corridor entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic city, transitioning from street-level walkways to elevated plazas and indoor lobbies. It begins as the character exits a covered wooden walkway onto an open city street flanked by glass office towers and sparse pedestrian traffic. As the character moves along a palm-lined sidewalk, the scene shifts toward a stairway bathed in green neon light, leading upward and away from the towers. The camera then follows the character through an indoor lobby featuring tropical plants and WILD BLUE signage before emerging onto an elevated outdoor walkway saturated in pink-magenta light and towering holographic billboards. Finally, the perspective descends into a bustling multi-level plaza filled with yellow cafe umbrellas and KIROSHI advertisements, before turning toward another green-lit corridor entrance.
